details.IncidentDetail: "[1] CT EMERGENCY CLOSURES 3 DUE TO PAVEMENT REPAIR. 1. STARTING 19:59 TILL 06:01 - NB 2 FROM ALVARADO ST TO GLENDALE BLVD FOR LANE # 3 - DURING THE CLOSURE CREW WILL CALL AND CHANGE THIS CLOSURE FROM # 3 AND OPEN IT UP AND TAKE THE # 2 LANE, REFERENCE CT CLOSURE - T2RA LOG 2. 2. SB 2 FROM GLENDALE BLVD TO HOLLYWOOD FWY VIA ALVARADO ST. RTE 101 FOR LANE # 3 - STARTING 19:59 TILL 06:01 AM, REFERENCE CT CLOSURE T2RA LOG 3 AND 3. SB 2 FROM GLENDALE BLVD TO ALVARAGDO STREET FOR LANE # 3 STARTING 20:59 TILL 05:01, REFERENCE CT CLOSURE T2RA LOG 1"
